trigger.context: referring to individuals diagnosed with dermatomyositis in patient-facing copy

quotes: "someone/people with dermatomyositis" for patient materials; "patients" acceptable in HCP materials
This guide governs **patient (DTC) materials**. Language rules differ by audience: "someone/people with dermatomyositis" for patient materials; "patients" acceptable in HCP materials.

rules.intent: Maintain patient-centric, empathetic person-first phrasing in patient-facing materials.
rules.rule_text: In patient (DTC) materials, use person-first language such as 'someone/people with dermatomyositis' instead of referring directly to them as 'patients'. The term 'patients' is only acceptable in HCP materials.

quotes: Patient brochure = master reference for visuals, messaging, and tone across **all** LISRAYA materials.

rules.intent: Ensure brand consistency across all touchpoints by anchoring execution to the patient brochure baseline.
rules.rule_text: The patient brochure serves as the master source of truth and reference for all visual styles, core messaging, and tone across all LISRAYA collateral.
